case_title: DALY PETER DBA TOP PRODUCTIONS VS MISSION ECONOMIC AND CULTURAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DALY PETER DBA TOP PRODUCTIONS AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ECONOMIC AND CULTURAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
INVALID SERVICE AS TO MECA, MISSING INFORMATION ON POS.
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO ROBERTO HERNANDEZ (MISSION ECONOMIC) RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DALY PETER DBA TOP PRODUCTIONS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MISSION ECONOMIC AND CULTURAL ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
